base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_map_spriteless — a tile (level_layout) from 1990 super mario world. World Map spriteless variants (alt palette for post-clear). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World Map spriteless variants (alt palette for post-clear)
